initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM attendance 
JOIN member ON attendance.link_to_member = member.member_id 
JOIN event ON attendance.link_to_event = event.event_id 
WHERE member.first_name = 'Sacha' 
  AND member.last_name = 'Harrison' 
  AND event.event_name = 'Student_Club' 
  AND event.event_date LIKE '2019%';
